title: ononis natrix var. ramosissima
intro: Ononis natrix var. ramosissima, also known as the 'Bristly Jointed Wood Sorrel', is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ononis natrix var. ramosissima include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting kidney function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has been used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various health conditions.
